CVE-2024-56072.title: An issue was discovered in FastNetMon Community Edition through 1 ...
CVE-2024-56072.summary: An issue was discovered in FastNetMon Community Edition through 1.2.7. The sFlow v5 plugin allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (application crash) via a crafted packet that specifies many sFlow samples.

CVE-2024-56073.title: An issue was discovered in FastNetMon Community Edition through 1 ...
CVE-2024-56073.summary: An issue was discovered in FastNetMon Community Edition through 1.2.7. Zero-length templates for Netflow v9 allow remote attackers to cause a denial of service (divide-by-zero error and application crash).
